meta_title: For Students: design with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Design with AI to Solve Stuck with Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome being stuck with basic apps. An intermediate-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are coding manually instead of designing systems. By leveraging AI-driven design tools like Antigravity to architect your logic and Claude Code to iterate your implementation, you shift from a 'code-first' bottleneck to a 'design-first' velocity, allowing you to build complex, production-ready SaaS applications rapidly.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks on a screen filled with boilerplate code, and the realization hits: you are trapped in the 'tutorial hell' of basic to-do lists and weather apps. You have the technical fundamentals, but the gap between those simple exercises and a functional, scalable SaaS product feels like a chasm that no amount of standard syntax memorization can bridge. 

Relief comes when you stop viewing yourself as a coder and start acting as an architect. By integrating AI design workflows into your development lifecycle, you bypass the friction of manual scaffolding and jump straight into solving high-level logic problems. This is how you transform from a student writing scripts into an engineer shipping software.

steps.title: Architect the Logic Flow
steps.description: Stop coding immediately. Use Antigravity to map out your application's state and data relationships to ensure a clean architecture before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level technical architecture for a multi-tenant SaaS application that includes user authentication, a subscription layer, and a dynamic dashboard. Define the database schema and API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create directory structure for a Next.js project based on the Antigravity architecture schema.'

steps.title: Bootstrap with AI Precision
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the boilerplate based on your Antigravity plan. This ensures your project structure is professional and scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a detailed project structure breakdown including component folders, service layers, and utility modules for the SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project with the directory structure defined by the Antigravity plan.'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe Services
steps.description: Focus on the backend logic. Use AI to enforce strict typing, which is the hallmark of professional-grade software that avoids common runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft TypeScript interfaces for the User, Subscription, and Project entities. Include Zod schemas for request validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement the backend service layer using the generated TypeScript interfaces and Zod validation.'

steps.title: Iterative UI Component Assembly
steps.description: Build your frontend by iterating on specific functional components rather than whole pages. This prevents 'code bloat' and maintains high component quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive dashboard layout component that consumes the API endpoints defined in step 1, using Tailwind CSS classes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create the dashboard component files and integrate them with the API service layer.'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Use AI to write unit and integration tests for your core logic. This validates your work and builds the confidence required for a production launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test cases for the core business logic in the subscription service, covering success and failure scenarios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run all tests and fix any failing edge cases discovered in the business logic.'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'design document' in your repo that Antigravity updates; it acts as your source of truth for AI agents.
Use Claude Code to refactor code in small chunks; never ask it to rewrite an entire file if the logic is complex.
Treat your AI interactions as a code review session; ask the model 'why' it chose a specific pattern over another.
Inject your own custom utility library into the Claude Code context to ensure the AI uses your preferred coding style.
Prioritize building the 'Happy Path' first; only use AI to handle edge cases once the core feature is verified and stable.
content.next_steps: Once your first production-ready feature is live, document the architecture in your portfolio and push the code to GitHub. Then, begin iterating on a secondary feature to practice continuous integration.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to ship software that actually matters. Stop building tutorials and start building a career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
